---
title: 'Don''t be a know it all'
date: '2020-04-04T06:35:00.0020000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '2181502125159890206'
blogger_filename: '/2020/04/dont-be-know-it-all.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

<div class="WordSection1">  <p class="MsoNormal">Nothing is more of a turn off than someone who sits on his pompous hill and pretends to know what’s best for everyone. “Everyone” “Always” “Never” “Should”.  <o:p></o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p></div>
